case_title: SHI YAN HUANG VS. YANG YANG et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, SHI YAN AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YANG INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA DIMENSION CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA YANG CONSTRUCTION PATRICK, SO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA DIMENSION CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT GROUP DBA YANG CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
